title: Super Dreamer Paisley Duvet Cover and Pillowcases, Printed Double Fitted Sheet, Reversible Floral Complete Bed Set, Grey
features: EYE-CATCHING FLOWER PATTERN: A striking floral pattern is printed onto this stylish complete double duvet set with fitted sheet to bring freshness and life into your bedroom. The ideal accompaniment for the spring and summer months, as well as a way to brighten the room in colder seasons, the printed design on this complete bedding set, is a great refreshment for your bedding collection.

EXPERTLY MANUFACTURED FOR SUPREME DURABILITY: This reversible duvet Double cover with fitted bed sheet double is designed to be enhancing your sleep experience for many nights to come, this long-lasting complete bed set is the ideal way to revitalize your home accessories in one simple step.
REVERSIBLE FOUR-PIECE SET: Containing a printed duvet cover, and a double fitted sheet with pillowcases, the reverse of this striking set features a rich color to brighten your bedroom.
MACHINE WASHABLE FOR SIMPLE UPKEEP: This sumptuous easy-care complete double duvet bedding set with a fitted sheet set can be washed in a domestic washing machine and is tumble dryer compatible.
As we Evolve, our homes should too. To make your home as comfortable as attractive, please visit the Amazon Official GC GAVENO CAVAILIA store.
